prefillPrompt: Set up and run my next ad campaign

hero.headline: Competitor research. USP mapping. Keyword lists. Full campaign setup.
hero.subhead: Toffu connects to your ad accounts and does the marketing work. Briefing, strategy, build, launch. You review. It executes.

demo.content: Set up a campaign targeting marketing managers who are frustrated with manual reporting
Researching competitors, keywords, and audience signals...
Building campaign structure, ad copy, and targeting...

**Campaign Ready for Review**

**Audience:** Marketing Managers, 28-45, Job title targeting + Interest: Marketing Software, Analytics Tools
**Estimated reach:** 180,000-240,000 (US)

---

**Campaign structure (Google Search):**
- 3 ad groups: Manual Reporting Pain, Competitor Comparison, ROI Tracking
- 24 keywords (12 exact, 8 phrase, 4 broad)
- Top keyword: 'marketing reporting automation' (2,400/mo, $4.20 CPC)

**Ad copy (top variant):**
Headline: 'Stop Building Reports Manually'
Desc: 'Your marketing data in one place. Toffu reads it, finds the insights, executes the fixes. Try free.'

**Budget:** $50/day | **Bidding:** Maximize Conversions
**Projected:** 11-18 signups/week at $19-$31 CPA

---

Say 'launch it' and it goes live in 3 minutes.

items.title: Competitor research
items.desc: Toffu scans what your competitors are running before building anything. It finds the angles they are using, the keywords they are buying, and the gaps you can win.

items.title: USP mapping
items.desc: Toffu reads your website, your existing ads, and your top-performing content to extract your real differentiators. No brief needed.

items.title: Keyword lists built automatically
items.desc: Toffu generates keyword lists from competitor data, search volume, and your category. It organizes them by intent and match type, ready to launch.

items.title: Campaign structure and copy
items.desc: Ad groups, headlines, descriptions, landing page recommendations. Toffu writes the full campaign and shows it to you before anything goes live.

items.title: Launch in one click
items.desc: You review the campaign. You say go. Toffu creates the campaigns, ad groups, and ads in Google Ads or Meta in minutes.

items.title: Ongoing optimization
items.desc: After launch, Toffu monitors performance, flags underperforming keywords, and proposes bid and budget adjustments. You approve. It executes.

howItWorks.title: Tell Toffu what you want to achieve.

steps.title: Connect your accounts
steps.desc: Google Ads, Meta Ads, GA4. OAuth in 60 seconds. Toffu reads your existing campaigns so it does not start from scratch.

steps.title: Describe your goal
steps.desc: 'Set up a campaign targeting marketing managers frustrated with manual reporting.' Plain English. No brief template, no keyword planner, no creative brief doc.

steps.title: Review and launch
steps.desc: Toffu shows you the campaign before it goes live. You approve. It creates and launches everything in minutes.

afterSection.title: Toffu keeps running it.
afterSection.subhead: Launching is the easy part. Optimization is where most campaigns die. Toffu handles it.

items.title: Weekly performance review
items.desc: Toffu checks every campaign every week. It tells you what is working, what is not, and exactly what to change.

items.title: Budget reallocation
items.desc: Top performers get more budget. Underperformers get paused. Toffu proposes the shift and executes when you approve.

items.title: New creative when results plateau
items.desc: Toffu detects creative fatigue before your CPA spikes. It proposes new angles and builds replacement ads.

faq.question: Does Toffu work with Google Ads and Meta?
faq.answer: Yes. Google Search, Google PMax, Meta Feed, Meta Stories, and more. Connect both accounts and Toffu works across them.

faq.question: Do I need to write a brief or provide a strategy?
faq.answer: No. Toffu reads your accounts, your competitors, and your goals and builds the strategy itself. You review the output before anything launches.

faq.question: How long does it take to go from request to live campaign?
faq.answer: Most campaigns are built in under 5 minutes and live within 10. Toffu handles the setup; Google and Meta review usually takes a few hours.

faq.question: What if I already have campaigns running?
faq.answer: Toffu reads your existing campaigns first. It builds new ones that complement what is working and avoids duplicating your current spend.

finalCta.title: Your competitors have been running while you build reports.
finalCta.subhead: Competitor research, keyword lists, ad copy, campaign setup. Toffu does all of it while you review the output.

seo.title: Run Your Marketing on Autopilot | Toffu AI
seo.description: Competitor research, USP mapping, keyword lists, and full campaign setup. Toffu does the marketing work. You review and approve. Try free.
seo.ogTitle: Competitor Research. Campaign Setup. Done Automatically.
seo.ogDescription: Toffu does the marketing work while you sit back. Connect, describe your goal, review, launch.
